## Custom agents in this repository

These examples build on the repository root `AGENTS.md`, which remains the primary source of coding and delivery conventions.

Use these agents to support an agent-first workflow:

- `workshop-orchestrator.agent.md` for end-to-end coordination and agent selection.
- `plan-and-handoff.agent.md` for scoping, assumptions, and handoff packets.
- `workshop-implementer.agent.md` for focused implementation against an agreed plan.
- `workshop-reviewer.agent.md` for coherence, validation, and important issue finding.

The set is intentionally focused so teams can see how `AGENTS.md`, custom agents, skills, and MCP complement one another without too much ceremony.
